author: corcoranwill
content:
Ethproofs call 8b (starts in ~30min) the topic today is Poseidon alternatives

(Poseidon is the hash-based cryptographic primitive that is the leading contender to be a key building block in post-quantum Ethereum) 

May 15, 2pm–4:30pm UTC, Zoom [link](https://ethereumfoundation.zoom.us/j/8286061638?pwd=YmprOHJOZWlFQW8wSEVFVEVQanFvQT09)

quick updates (2min + 1min Q&A)

@Fara Woolf : Ethproofs
Yoichi Hirai: evm-asm
Felix Lin: zkDTVM
@Francesco Risitano : leanDA
Nicolas Schleicher: SPHINCS+ aggregation
hash security (3min + 1min Q&A)

@Justin Drake : multi-XMSS and SHA4
François Garillot: Athena consortium
Léo Perrin: Athena consortium
Giussepe Vitto: bounty claim candidates
Manuel Puebla: SuperHash
Danny Willems: ao-security
Poseidon alternatives (7min + 1min Q&A)

(2001) Onur Kilic: SHA2 (in leanVM)
(2020) Alex Vlasov, Al Kindi: Blake3 (in Airbender, Miden)
(2021) Leo Fan: sumhash512
(2022) Tomer Ashur: RPO
(2022) Léo Perrin: Anemoi
(2023) Alan Szepieniec: Tip5 (in Neptune)
(2023) Markus Schofnegger: Monolith (& Skyscraper/RC)
(2023) Stefano Trevisani: Arion
(2024) Sundas Tariq: Xhash
(2025): TBD: Polocolo (& Grendel)
(2026) Fabian Schmid: BenX
(1996) Binyi Chen: Ajtai
